title: Anti AFK
description: Say bye to server kicking you for being AFK
body:
# 🔥 AntiAFK Mod 🔥  
**Never get kicked again for grabbing snacks!**  

---

## 🎮 Features That Go *Brrr*  
- **`G` Key Toggle** - Your AFK on/off switch!  
- **Sneaky Server Tricks** - Micro-moves that scream "I'm here!"  
  - 🌀 Random head tilts  
  - 🦘 Tiny bunny hops  
  - 📍 Position updates  
- **Big Green Text** - Know when you're AFK-proof!  
- **Zero Config** - Install → Press G → Profit 💰  

---

## 🤖 How It Works  
> "But officer, I was *totally* moving!"  
This mod does the **digital equivalent of**:  
- Tapping your foot 👟  
- Checking your watch ⌚  
- Whispering "Still here!" every 2 seconds  

---

## 🛡️ Server Compatibility  
Works on:  
✅ Vanilla  
✅ Forge/Fabric servers  
✅ Most semi-vanilla  

Might **NOT** work on:  
❌ Hypixel-like anti-cheat systems  
❌ Plugins with movement pattern detection  

---

## 📥 Installation  
1. Drag mod into `mods` folder  
2. Join server  
3. Press `G`  
4. AFK like you just don't care 😎  

---

⚠️ **Warning to Servers:**  
"This player is clearly vibrating at molecular level - NOT AFK!"  

🐞 **Found a bug?** DM `sourish` on Discord!
